name: opencode-telegram-send-file
description: OpenCode plugin that adds a telegram_send_file tool — send files and photos to Telegram via OpenWork. Images are sent with inline preview (sendPhoto); other files as attachments (sendDocument). Zero config.

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build

author: technocidal
